title: 接口及方案  MHA/GQA
raw_content:
接口及方案  MHA/GQA
说明：
attention 模块中 rope 算子输入  [1, total_token, head_dim*head],  经过rope后， 根据int64_t *q_seql_length_list, // q seq_len for all batch [h0, h1, h2, ...]
将 batch*seq 分开，根据blokc_table 放到 Q_block KV_cache中
MHA/GQA 输入  logic shape  Q [batch * qhead, H, headdim]   KV  [batch * kvhead, H, headdim]
输出仍然会根据q_seql_length_list， 将 batch seq packing到一个维度


接口：
// Q: BF16 NUMA   logic shape [batch * qhead, H, headdim]   U#shape  [Q_N,  Q_H, head_Dim]
// KVcache  E_KV(BF16/INT8)   NUMA(MHA)/ UMA(GQA/MQA)     logic shape [batch * kvhead, H, headdim]   U#shape  [KV_N,  KV_H, head_Dim]
//  Q:  BF16  NUMA
//  KVcache  E_KV(BF16/INT8)  NUMA(MHA)/ UMA(GQA/MQA)
// Out  NUMA [qhead, total_token, head_dim]  /  UMA [1, total_token, head_dim*qhead]  
template <typename E_KV, suMemArchType KVCacheMemType, suMemArchType OutMemType, suMemArchType AttnWsMemType>
suError_t launchMaskedMultiheadAttention_IFB(NumaDynMatrix3D<BF16, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> query_prefill, // input tensor   NUMA  BF16  logic shape  [batch_prefill * qhead, H, headdim]
                                             NumaDynMatrix3D<BF16, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> query_decode,  // Input tensor   NUMA  BF16  logic shape  [batch_decode,  qhead*input_len,  headdim]
                                             DynMatrix3D<E_KV, KVCacheMemType, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> key_cache,   // Input tensor   UMA16  BF16/S8   [KV_N, KV_H, headdim]  logic shape  [batch, kvhead, H, headdim]
                                             DynMatrix3D<E_KV, KVCacheMemType, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> value_cache, // Input tensor   UMA16  BF16/S8   [KV_N, KV_H, headdim]
                                             DynVectors<FP32, KVCacheMemType> key_scale, // Input tensor   UMA16  FP32      [KV_N, KV_H]
                                             DynVectors<FP32, KVCacheMemType> value_scale, // Input tensor   UMA16  FP32      [KV_N, KV_H]
                                             DynMatrix3D<BF16, OutMemType, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> attn, // Output,   NUMA BF16  : [q_heads, total_seq, head_dim]
                                             DynMatrix3D<FP32, AttnWsMemType, BLOCK_COL_MAJOR> attn_ws_uma, // internal   UMA16 FP32 [q_heads, total_seq, head_dim_align64]
                                             int64_t *Q_block_table, // for Q         shape:  [batch][q_heads][Q_table_W]
                                             int64_t *KV_block_table, // for kvcache  shape:  [batch][kv_heads][KV_table_W]
                                             int64_t *q_seql_length_list, // q seq_len for all batch      [h0, h1, h2, ...]
                                             int64_t *q_seql_start_list,  // q seq start pos for all batch[0,  h0,  h0+h1,  h0+h1+h2, ...]
                                             int64_t *seql_length_list,   // kvcache seq_len for all batch [h0', h1', h2', ...]
                                             int64_t *mask_list,
                                             FP32 *mask_interleave, // for Alibi mask, shape: [q_heads]
                                             MaskModeType mask_mode, // mask_mode: support CAUSAL/ALIBI
                                             int64_t *window_mask, // mask value [64, 64, 32......16]
                                             int32_t window_mask_cnt, // mask window nums
                                             FP32 frac, // FP32 frac = 1.f / sqrt(head_dim);
                                             int32_t batch_prefill,
                                             int32_t batch_decode,
                                             int32_t q_heads, // q_heads per die
                                             int32_t kv_heads, //  alway 1
                                             int32_t head_dim, // head_dim = 576
                                             int32_t maxSeql, // the max value in  kvcache_seqlen
                                             int32_t window_size ,
                                             int32_t Q_table_W, // Q_block_table shape [batch][q_heads][Q_table_W]
                                             int32_t KV_table_W, // KV_block_table shape [batch][kv_heads][KV_table_W]
                                             int32_t total_seq, // sum of all batch's seq_num
                                             int32_t input_len, // para,  MTP， input_len=1 or 2
                                             int32_t SizePerRegionPitch,
                                             int32_t spc_num, // spc_num
                                             int32_t die_num, // die_num
                                             suStream_t stream = NULL) {


prefill 代码逻辑：

任务拆分：  将 batch*head 拆分到每个spc
func1:    chunkQ=128， chunkK=256  Q*K结果输出到TLR

for  loop in batch*head for per spc
     for loop i in H, step chunkQ //  Q0  Q1  Q2 ...
         load Qi to Abuf
      for loop j in H, step chunkK //  K0V0  K1V1 ...
             load Kj  to Bbuf
             mma: Qi*KjT -> store in TLR
             load Vj  to Bbuf 
             softmax:  max_j, expsum_j save in TLR, result Score BF16 save in GMB
             load Score to Abuf
             mma:  S*V-> store in GMB
             updata max_new, expsum_new, O
        save O to HBM (result)
func2:
chunkQ=128， chunkK=512    Q*K结果输出到 GMB

decode 代码逻辑：
func1:
 不分chunk, Q*K的结果(FP32), 以及softmax结果（BF16）直接存放在GMB，  K V 不会重复load 因此没有 preload GMB
 对于seq 较长， GMB 4M 不够用时，该kernel 不支持
image2026-1-19_14-24-38.png

func2:
 同prefill  func1,  拆分chunk实现， Q_H=1,  因此Q不拆分，  chunk_K 可以作为模板参数， 支持任意长seq
func3:
 同prefill  func2,  在chunk基础上，  batch_head 间进行pingpong

decode  GQA/MQA:
 Q    NUMA   BF16 [batch*q_head ,  1,  head_dim]
 K    UMA      BF16/INT8    [batch*kv_head,  H,  head_dim]
 V    UMA      BF16/INT8    [batch*kv_head,  H,  head_dim]
从GQA的实现原理可知， 对于一组qhead, 公用一个 kvhead, 因此将输入Q 的shape可以按如下处理
 Q    NUMA   BF16             [ batch*kv_head ,  1 * (qhead/kvhead),  head_dim]
 K    UMA      BF16/INT8    [batch*kv_head,  H,  head_dim]
 V    UMA      BF16/INT8    [batch*kv_head,  H,  head_dim]
任务拆分： 将 batch*kv_head 拆分到每个spc
特点：  mma 最小粒度64*64， 有 (qhead/kvhead)行有效, 相比MHA, 提高了硬件利用率
